# Ken Mueller

Ken Mueller runs Acme Corp's largest plant and is the engagement's ground-level blocker. He sees the carbon baseline as head-office overhead that competes with production targets, and he is slow to hand over the meter readings and fuel logs the Scope 1 inventory depends on. His cooperation matters more than his title suggests, because his site is the single biggest source of direct emissions.

Ken reports to Grace Bello. He attended early data-collection calls but has progressively disengaged — a pattern the consultant flags as a risk to the Scope 1 completion date. Bringing him back online typically requires Grace or Reema to apply pressure directly.
